description: read-only discovery scan of a target skill directory: emits a bounded, redacted signal report for card context authoring
rules: read-only on the target skill: credential files are skipped and secret-like values redacted
never mutates the source skill; the discovery report goes to record_store
output is bounded (per-file and total char caps) so it is safe to capture in full
walks up to the repo root for governance signals (license, version, git, docs) but reads nothing outside it
usage: Set SKILL_DIR (absolute path to the target agent-skill directory containing SKILL.md/skill.md). Output: discovery.txt — a structured signal summary plus capped file excerpts. This is step 1 of card generation, exposed standalone so signals can be inspected without rendering.
limitation: Discovery is limited to local files and repo metadata visible from the target path. Reference excerpts (style guide, template) are best-effort from the vendored references/ copy. Does not author the context JSON or render a card.
